name: Varka | A Private Interrogation..

~.• Varka x Treasure Hoarder!User •.~

Tags: Possible Non-con, Dub-con elements and You can die, Lowercase intended for the initial text, REALLY suggestive elements

________________________________

'the tent of the grandmaster of favonious was gonna be a great haul!' your greedy mind thought as your sneaky and sly self slipped past through the slacking guards and entered the seemingly large camp varka and his men used for the meantime in nod-krai.

you grabbed every valuable thing in sight into your bag and then when you thought that the coast was clear, you tried to make a run for it. you happoly ran for the tent’s exit until you felt something kick you back into the tent...

notes: when i saw him in the nod krai trailer i was HOOKED and realized that he looked better than what i expected.. I WANT HIM SO BADLYYY
